title: Cobblemon: Tents
body:
# Cobblemon: Tents
![7 Tents of colors Red, Blue, Yellow, Green, Pink, Black, and White](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e8b3f872ad94e4a22b119988e1389b33a98ae5d_0.webp)

Portable, colorful tents for your Cobblemon adventures! Set up camp anywhere, decorate the inside, and pack it all up when you're ready to move.

## ✨ Features

Fully Portable: Shift + Right-click to pack up your tent. It saves all the blocks and items you placed inside!

Dyeable: Right-click a placed tent with any Cobblemon Apricorn to instantly change its color (7 colors available).

Interactive Doors: Right-click the entrance to open and close the tent flap.

## 🛠️ Crafting

Ingredients: 6 White Wool, 3 Sticks, 1 Apricorn (Any Color)

Top Row: 3x White Wool

Middle Row: 1x White Wool, 1x Apricorn, 1x White Wool

Bottom Row: 3x Sticks ![tents]
